name: meshy-loaded-model-ripper
description: Chrome/Edge MV3 helper that captures Meshy loader GLB output, previews it, and exports GLB or OBJ.

scripts.check: node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/page-hook.js && node --check extension/popup.js && node --check extension/export-boot.js && node --check extension/export.js
